rulings.Case Title: PEDRO RODRIGUEZ ET AL VS. FLOWSERVE US INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday 13, 2016 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Sellers and Sellers Company's motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is continued pursuant to plaintiffs' request for a continuance, which is granted. Plaintiffs demonstrated that facts essential to justify opposition may exist and explained why they cannot now be presented. (C.C.P. § 437c(h).) The parties must appear at the hearing on July 13, 2016 to discuss a briefing schedule and hearing date. The hearing will be at 9:30a.m. Plaintiffs must bring a proposed order to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. = (503/GLW)
